name: Key Lime Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: -Butter: 1/2 stick unsalted butter, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
-Preheat oven to 375°F.
-Crust: Combine crumbs and sugar. Mix in melted butter. Spread on bottom and sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan. Bake for 8 minutes.
-Filling: Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Add sour cream, flour, eggs one at a time, key lime juice, and vanilla. Pour over crust. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes. Reduce temperature to 250°F and bake an additional 50-55 minutes or until set in the center.
